handouts.label: Törweg Chart
handouts.desc: Floki's harbour map — names the villages along the Whale-Road approach to Torweg.

handouts.label: Sea Hag
handouts.desc: Portrait of the Kuo-Toa hag encountered on the Whale-Road — passes cargo north toward Yngondi.

handouts.label: Harbour Map
handouts.desc: Torweg harbour map — marks the south dock where Vane moves cargo, and the Saltbone Inn.

handouts.label: Brynja
handouts.desc: Portrait of Brynja the archivist — nervous, precise, more frightened than she lets show.

handouts.label: Coded Message
handouts.desc: Optional — the coded message the party carries. Can be presented to Serris or decoded here.

handouts.label: Brynja's Record
handouts.desc: Brynja's archived document — traces a family that appears in Lösweg sixty years ago with no origin.

handouts.label: Mathr Family Tree
handouts.desc: The genealogy Brynja found — Mathr's family appears fully-formed in the council record. Thread D.

handouts.label: Aeorian Note
handouts.desc: A note referencing Aeorian materials and Ashvein. Thread B — points toward Xyrrath's phial.

handouts.label: Duvash's Third Letter
handouts.desc: The third consignment letter from Duvash — traces objects moving north toward the Maw. Thread C.

handouts.label: Mathr's Token
handouts.desc: The token recovered from the Halvash end-fight. Belongs to Mathr, not Vane — the evidence that points past him.

handouts.label: Third Letter
handouts.desc: If Vane dies — the letter he was carrying. Confirms Mathr's direct orders for the south dock operation.

handouts.label: Truthspeaker
handouts.desc: Portrait of the Truthspeaker — arrives at end of session, sent by Beorn, does not know why.
